Title: Mandates a stay of foreclosure sales in all actions where a defendant has filed and perfected an appeal from a judgment of foreclosure and sale
Summary: Mandates a stay of foreclosure sales in all actions where a defendant has filed and perfected an appeal from a judgment of foreclosure and sale until the appeal is decided or dismissed, unless expressly waived by the defendant.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the civil practice law and rules, in relation to mandating a stay of foreclosure sales in all actions where a defendant has filed and perfected an appeal from a judgment of foreclosure and sale
